title: sophora lehmannii
intro: Sophora lehmannii, also known as Keshwa Amarga or Amargo, is a plant species in the legume family Fabaceae, native to the Andean region of South America. The medicinal properties of Sophora lehmannii include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic. Sophora lehmannii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as hypertension, arthritis, and digestive issues.
